source: flywheel.duckdb load_history (PCS data warehouse, generated 2026-03-09 to 2026-03-23 by v1 flywheel pipeline)
method: 27,030 PCS Q1 2026 records (= 13,515 unique loads after dedup) extracted from raw.load_history; loaded into v2 prod Postgres as temp table; aggregated by Sun-Sat week against loads.delivered_on.

gapAttribution.evidence: PCS Q1 by-customer breakdown: 894 JRT loads in Q1; ~447 in weeks where v2 data exists. JRT enters loads to PCS manually; no API.

gapAttribution.bucket: Logistiq triplicate phantoms still in v2 raw
gapAttribution.evidence: Counted in earlier audit. sourceId-cascade fix (commit e12e320) stops new ones; backfill cleanup deferred.

gapAttribution.bucket: Jenny's Queue non-standard work (Truck Pushers, Equipment Moves)
gapAttribution.evidence: Sheet's 'Other Jobs to be Invoiced' section, ~25/week × 13 weeks. No v2 surface yet.

gapAttribution.bucket: Sheet alias gaps (v2 wells exist, names not yet aliased)
gapAttribution.evidence: Cleared mostly in tonight's well-create work (7 wells, 2,645 loads bound).

secondaryFindings.title: Load number is NOT a cross-source identifier
secondaryFindings.detail: Zero load_no overlap between PCS (13,515 distinct) and v2 (24,102 raw). PCS uses an independent sequence. Bridge has to be via tickets, dates, weights — not load_no.

secondaryFindings.title: PCS DOES carry JRT loads — 894 in Q1 2026
secondaryFindings.detail: Team enters JRT loads to PCS manually. v2's 'JRT no-feed' gap is an ingest gap, not a coverage gap — until JRT has an API, v2 should read JRT FROM PCS.

secondaryFindings.title: PCS destination = CITY, not well name
secondaryFindings.detail: 32 distinct destination cities for Q1 2026 (Falls City, Center, Calliham, ...). City→well bridge requires a separate lookup. Three vocab axes: PropX (well name), Sheet (carrier-prefixed), PCS (city).

secondaryFindings.title: PCS active Load API only returns 44 records
secondaryFindings.detail: /dispatching/v1/load returns operational/in-flight only. The 13,515 Q1 records exist in load_history (warehouse). For displacement Phase 2, the right read path is the FLYWHEEL pipeline OR PCS Invoice API — not Load API.
